2026-0397
2026-04-29AAFCFarm Products Agencies ActReappointment of a member of the National Farm Products CouncilReappointment of Brian Douglas of Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, as a member of the National Farm Products Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on October 2, 2027; and his designation as chairperson of the National Farm Products Council, effective June 11, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a member of the National Farm Products Council
precis: Reappointment of Brian Douglas of Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, as a member of the National Farm Products Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending on October 2, 2027; and his designation as chairperson of the National Farm Products Council, effective June 11, 2026.
